tutorial_2.text: In order to kill an enemy, you need to kill it!

tutorial_4.text: Oh… Right… You don't know how…

tutorial_6.text: Now you've got it! Attack that dude a few more times, I'm sure he'll die eventually

tutorial_7.text: What's that? Oh… Sorry, I forgot to add a health check!

tutorial_9.text: There we go! Try hitting him again!

tutorial_10.text: Great! You now know how to kill enemies!!! I'm proud of you already

tutorial_11.text: Let's move on. Go into the next room

tutorial_12.text: This one's unkillable. Don't even bother, he literally CANNOT DIE

tutorial_13.text: But, you can try something else with him…

tutorial_14.text: When you hold down {chargeKey}, you'll charge a Dash move!

tutorial_15.text: Dashing allows you to move through enemies without taking damage!

tutorial_16.text: Try it out a few times!

tutorial_17.text: You may have noticed that the blue bar under your Health changes when you charge

tutorial_18.text: That blue bar is your Special bar!

tutorial_19.text: Each charge consumes some Special energy

tutorial_20.text: Make sure to pay attention to it!

tutorial_21.text: You won't be able to charge if you don't have enough!

tutorial_23.text: Notice how the ground and walls have a certain color?

tutorial_25.text: Each flavor gives both you and your enemies certain effects

tutorial_26.text: You'll find them listed every time you enter a level

tutorial_27.text: Your goal for each floor is to kill all enemies

tutorial_28.text: After that, you move to the next floor!

tutorial_30.text: You think you're ready to take on the ghosts?
